'''{{PAGENAME}}''' is a Gaiad character mentioned in chapter(s) 11 and 13 and 14 and 15 and 16 and 18 and 22 and 26 and 38 and 39 and 50 and 53 and 54.

[[Category:Generated Gaiad character entries for the 1st 62 chapters]]
[[Category:Removed redirects]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:Newest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
